title: Positive flow: User navigates to the home page and performs a search
test_steps: Open the Talabat.com mobile app. | Click on the search icon in the header. | Enter a cuisine name in the 'All Cuisines' input field. | Click on the 'FIND RESTAURANTS' button.
expected_result: The app should display a list of restaurants based on the entered cuisine.

title: Negative flow: User enters an invalid cuisine name
test_steps: Open the Talabat.com mobile app. | Click on the search icon in the header. | Enter 'invalid_cuisine' in the 'All Cuisines' input field. | Click on the 'FIND RESTAURANTS' button.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating that the entered cuisine is invalid.

title: Boundary validation: User selects a valid cuisine
test_steps: Open the Talabat.com mobile app. | Click on the search icon in the header. | Enter 'Italian' in the 'All Cuisines' input field. | Click on the 'FIND RESTAURANTS' button.
expected_result: The app should display a list of Italian restaurants.

title: Toggles state: User selects a city and area
test_steps: Open the Talabat.com mobile app. | Click on the 'Select Your City' input field. | Select 'Dubai' from the dropdown list. | Click on the 'Select Your Area' input field. | Select 'Downtown Dubai' from the dropdown list. | Click on the 'FIND RESTAURANTS' button.
expected_result: The app should display a list of restaurants in Downtown Dubai, Dubai.

title: Clickable buttons: User clicks on the 'FIND RESTAURANTS' button
test_steps: Open the Talabat.com mobile app. | Click on the 'FIND RESTAURANTS' button.
expected_result: The app should display a list of restaurants.

title: Input validation: User enters a valid cuisine name
test_steps: Open the Talabat.com mobile app. | Click on the search icon in the header. | Enter 'Italian' in the 'All Cuisines' input field. | Click on the 'FIND RESTAURANTS' button.
expected_result: The app should display a list of Italian restaurants.

title: Navigation: User navigates to the login page
test_steps: Open the Talabat.com mobile app. | Click on the 'LOGIN' button in the footer.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the login page.

title: Accessibility: User performs a search using voice commands
test_steps: Open the Talabat.com mobile app. | Enable voice commands on the device. | Speak the command to search for Italian restaurants.
expected_result: The app should display a list of Italian restaurants.
